description_sub-domain: Internal YDB type. All user-created databases are SubDomains. Domain type is used only for top-level cluster directories.
description_domain: Internal YDB type. Domain is top-level cluster directory.
description_paths: Total number of schema objects (tables, directories, indexes, views, etc.)
description_shards: Number of data shards (tablets) currently used by tables in this database
alert_no-limit: Failed to load limit data. Usage percentage cannot be calculated.
